vehicle.label: Tiltrotor VTOL Hybrid
vehicle.desc: Fixed-wing VTOL with 2 tilting rotor nacelles, BVLOS long-range capable

parts.label: Center Fuselage Spine
parts.spec: CFRP box beam center fuselage, avionics bay, wing spar socket, front GPS boom mount, belly camera window

parts.label: Main Wing (2-piece)
parts.spec: Straight wing, 4S NACA 2412, dual 15mm CFRP spar, 900mm half-span, 160mm chord, 3-layer CFRP skin

parts.label: Nacelle Assembly x 2
parts.spec: Tilting nacelle assembly, 0-90deg tilt axis, 6309 bearing set, servo-driven worm gear, motor and ESC pocket

parts.label: Tilt Servo + Linkage x 2
parts.spec: 25kg-cm DS3218 servo per nacelle, titanium pushrod, dual ball joints, tilt range 0-93deg, crash-tolerant

parts.label: V-Tail x 2 (Ruddervator)
parts.spec: +-35deg V-tail ruddervator pair, MG996R servo each, 30deg dihedral, CFRP sandwich panel, hinge piano wire

parts.label: Landing Gear (Tri)
parts.spec: Tricycle landing gear, spring-steel skid arms, 55mm dia wheels, CG at 1/3 chord, 200mm wheelbase

parts.label: Battery Bay (Slide-In)
parts.spec: Belly slide-in battery bay, 6S 8000mAh Li-ion pack, Velcro + strap dual retention, CG position 28% MAC

parts.label: Payload Nose Bay
parts.spec: Interchangeable nose payload bay, Day/IR camera gimbal or survey sensor, 80x60x50mm, 300g payload limit

parts.label: Tilt-Axis Harness + Datum Service Bay
parts.spec: Tiltrotor integration_service module with tilt-axis harness_channel, slack_loop, interface_datum, service_hatch, connector keying, and nacelle-to-wing load-path inspection access

requirements: Carry wing spar loads into fuselage spine
Dissipate heat from avionics bay
Transmit motion from vertical tail to ruddervator
Provide access for maintenance and servicing of avionics bay
Distribute power from battery pack to avionics bay

generated_parts.spec: Interchangeable nose payload bay, Day/IR camera gimbal or survey sensor, 80x60x50mm, 300g payload limit

requirements.spec: Interchangeable nose payload bay, Day/IR camera gimbal or survey sensor
requirements.context: Fixed-wing VTOL with 2 tilting rotor nacelles, BVLOS long-range capable
pass_1_criteria: Battery, sensor, actuator, cartridge, payload, cable, or joint modules remain removable without full teardown.
Harnesses, tubes, or service channels are routed through visible raceways or protected channels.
Access is represented by geometry: hatch, pocket, channel, fastener pattern, slot, window, or removable cover.
Every cable exit shows strain relief geometry (clamp, grommet, tie point) and routing respects a stated minimum bend radius away from moving joints and sharp edges.
Connectors are reachable without disassembling structure, have finger/tool clearance, and mention keying or labeling to prevent mis-mating.

verify.rule: cad_brief.mass_est_g must be a numeric grams value, and verify must include a mass/budget check.

verify.rule: Each required evidence_feature must appear in part_tree/geometry_ops.

verify.value: Interfaces named with exact neighboring subsystem labels and chosen connection_type + DOF + clearance_mm + required_feature.
verify.rule: Name exact neighboring subsystem labels when they mate, and choose connection_type + DOF + clearance_mm + required_feature so the neighbor can declare the same joint family back.

verify.value: Visible insert/washer/locking/preload evidence on critical joints.
verify.rule: Critical joints need visible insert/washer/locking/preload evidence and torque_Nm or preload intent.

verify.value: All required fields are present and correctly formatted.
verify.rule: Include checks for schema completeness, mass budget, P0-to-geometry traceability, interface reciprocity, and fastener locking/preload evidence.

risk.desc: Risk of improper cable management leading to strain or damage.

risk.mit: Label all connectors and ensure keying or unique identifiers.

risk.desc: Risk of structural integrity issues if fasteners are not properly preloaded.
risk.mit: Specify torque values and conduct regular inspections.

risk.desc: Risk of access difficulties if service windows are not clearly defined.
risk.mit: Ensure all access points are clearly marked and easily accessible.
